usage: createBusGuide [-help] [-type {soft hard}] -netGroup <netGroup> -layer {id | id1:id2} {[{[-centerLine {x1 y1 x2 y2} ] -width <value>} [-beginExt <value>] [-endExt <value>]] | -rect {x1 y1 x2 y2}}

options.name: -centerLine
options.description: The coordinate of the center line of the bus guide segment

options.name: -layer
options.description: layer id or a layer range

options.name: -rect
options.description: The rectangle of the bus guide segment with lower left and upper right coordinates

options.name: -type
options.description: Specifies the constraint type of bus guide. If doesn't use this option to define the constraint type, the value of constraint type is soft.
